wpr_custom_css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Outfit:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap'); #mg-wprm-wrap,#mg-wprm-wrap *{font-family:'Outfit',sans-serif!important;} #mg-wprm-wrap{background:#f0fdf4!important;} #wprmenu_bar{background:#14532d!important;box-shadow:0 2px 16px rgba(20,83,45,.3)!important;} #mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li>a{padding:13px 26px!important;color:#14532d!important;letter-spacing:.02em;transition:all .25s;border-left:3px solid transparent;} #mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li>a:hover,#mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li.current-menu-item>a{border-left-color:#16a34a!important;background:rgba(22,163,74,.08)!important;color:#166534!important;} #wprmenu_menu_ul li{border-bottom:1px solid rgba(20,83,45,.07)!important;} .eco-header{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#14532d,#166534);padding:28px 26px 22px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(187,247,208,.2);} .eco-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;background:rgba(187,247,208,.15);border:1px solid rgba(187,247,208,.3);border-radius:20px;padding:4px 12px;margin-bottom:12px;} .eco-badge span{color:#bbf7d0;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.1em;} .eco-header h4{color:#f0fdf4;font-size:17px;font-weight:600;margin:0 0 4px;} .eco-header p.sub{color:#bbf7d0;font-size:12px;margin:0;} .wpr_social_icons{padding:14px 26px;display:flex;justify-content:flex-start;gap:10px;border-top:1px solid rgba(20,83,45,.1);} .wpr_social_icons a{width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(20,83,45,.08);display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:background .2s;} .wpr_social_icons a:hover{background:rgba(20,83,45,.18);}
content_before_menu_element:
